Metacognition refers to the process of thinking about and reflecting on your own thought processes, decision-making, and cognitive skills. It involves being aware of how you make decisions, evaluate information, and solve problems. In the context of your career decision and goal to be consistent, developing metacognitive skills can help you better understand your own thought patterns and make more informed choices. Can you think of how metacognition might apply to your current dilemma of choosing between the stable and risky job offers?
